agentSummary.headline: 8 STOs aging beyond 48 hours — all critical
agentSummary.summary: The AI agent has analyzed your supply chain data. All 8 pending STOs have exceeded the 48-hour threshold, with the oldest at 122 hours. Vehicle fill rate (76.2%) is within target range. OTIF at 100% is excellent but pending STOs risk degrading it. Warehouse utilisation averaging 62.2% — below the 65–80% optimal band. No SKUs below safety stock currently.

recommendedActions.title: Expedite STO-004 and STO-015 — aging 122 hours
recommendedActions.reasoning: Both STOs created on Mar 9, expected delivery Mar 13 — now 5 days overdue. STO-004 targets DC-Chennai (600 units), STO-015 targets DC-Delhi (420 units).
recommendedActions.suggestedAction: Contact logistics partner for immediate dispatch; escalate to regional ops.
recommendedActions.estimatedImpact: Prevent OTIF drop and potential stock-out at target DCs

recommendedActions.title: Prioritize high-priority STOs for DC-Delhi
recommendedActions.reasoning: 3 high-priority STOs (STO-003, STO-013, STO-006) targeting DC-Delhi with combined 2,200 units. Delhi warehouse at 64% utilisation — capacity available.
recommendedActions.suggestedAction: Consolidate Delhi-bound STOs into 2 shipments; assign dedicated vehicles.

recommendedActions.title: Rebalance warehouse utilisation
recommendedActions.reasoning: All 3 warehouses below 65% optimal threshold (Bangalore 62.5%, Chennai 60%, Delhi 64%). Significant inbound expected (8,780 units total).
recommendedActions.suggestedAction: Pre-allocate receiving capacity; prioritize inbound for Chennai (lowest util).
recommendedActions.estimatedImpact: Smooth receiving; avoid bottlenecks when inbound arrives

recommendedActions.title: Review Primary leg freight costs
recommendedActions.reasoning: Primary leg avg freight/shipment (₹47,357) is 5.5x higher than Secondary (₹8,567). 7 shipments covering 9,120 km — route optimization opportunity.
recommendedActions.suggestedAction: Analyze top 3 Primary routes for consolidation or alternative carriers.

agentInsights.insight: All 8 pending STOs exceed 48-hour threshold. Oldest STOs (STO-004, STO-015) aging at 122 hours — 5 days overdue. Immediate dispatch required.
Vehicle fill rate at 76.2% is within the 75–85% target band. OTIF at 100% — excellent performance on shipped orders.
Average warehouse utilisation at 62.2% — below the 65% optimal threshold. Chennai warehouse lowest at 60%. Large inbound expected (8,780 units) will improve utilisation.
Primary leg contributes 79% of total freight cost (₹3.3L of ₹4.2L) but only 47% of shipments. Consider multi-stop routing for Pre-primary + Primary consolidation.
All 6 SKUs above safety stock. Fans - Ceiling has highest buffer (1,130 units above safety). Strong inbound pipeline (8,780 units expected).

conversationalQueries.response: All 8 pending STOs are critical (>48h). The most urgent are STO-004 (122h, DC-Chennai, 600 units) and STO-015 (122h, DC-Delhi, 420 units) — both 5 days overdue. Next priority: STO-003, STO-010, STO-013 at 98 hours each. I recommend consolidating Delhi-bound STOs for faster dispatch.

Overall freight cost per unit is ₹95.09. Primary leg is the most expensive at ₹47,357 avg/shipment (79% of total freight). Pre-primary is ₹17,750 and Secondary is ₹8,567. Vehicle fill rate is healthy at 76.2%. Opportunity: consolidate 3 Primary shipments to save ~10-15% on those legs.

3 warehouses averaging 62.2% utilisation — slightly below the 65% optimal threshold. Delhi is highest at 64% (3,200/5,000 pallets), Chennai lowest at 60% (2,100/3,500). Inbound of 8,780 units expected across all warehouses will improve utilisation significantly.

No SKUs are below safety stock currently. All 6 SKUs have healthy buffers. Fans - Ceiling has the highest buffer (2,630 vs 1,500 safety). Inbound pipeline of 8,780 units across all SKUs. Recommend monitoring post-STO dispatch to ensure stock levels remain adequate.

conversationalQueries.query: Give me a summary of today's operations
conversationalQueries.response: OTIF: 100% (excellent). 8 STOs pending — all critical (>48h), oldest at 122h. Vehicle fill rate: 76.2% (on target). Warehouse util: 62.2% (below optimal). 0 SKUs below safety. Top action: expedite STO-004 and STO-015 immediately, consolidate Delhi-bound shipments.

agentCapabilities.description: Agent monitors STO aging and surfaces critical items before they escalate
Prioritized actions with reasoning and estimated impact — human approves, agent proposes
Ask in natural language — 'Which STOs need attention?' — get instant answers
Correlates transportation, warehouse, inventory — not siloed dashboards
